vllm.title: Add support GPT-NeoX Models without attention biases
vllm.author: dalgarak
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables support for GPT-NeoX models without attention bias.
All models with the currently released GPT-NeoX architecture use attention bias by default, but the next version of huggingface transformers will support models without attention bias (merged PR - huggingface/transformers#28126), an
